name: The truth unveiled
description:
Betrayal:

Rowan Draven and Louie Moretti were once brothers in blood—until betrayal tore them apart. Louie and his wife were arrested, their only child taken in by the Dravens. Years later, a long-buried truth emerges: the arrests were a lie, orchestrated by the very people who claimed to protect their child. Now, with the weight of deception on their shoulders, the past demands justice... or revenge.

The Draven family:

Rowan and Bianca Drawin

Blake Drawin

Moretti Family:

Rowan and Siella Moretti
